title: Finding an Internship 找实习
scene: 学生在招聘会上和招聘人员交流

lines.en: Hi, I am a junior at City University. Are you hiring interns?
lines.zh: 您好，我是城市大学的大三学生。你们在招实习生吗？

lines.en: Yes, we have openings in marketing and design.
lines.zh: 是的，市场和设计部门都有空缺。

lines.en: I am majoring in marketing. What does the internship involve?
lines.zh: 我学的是市场专业。实习内容包括什么？

lines.en: You will help with social media, campaigns, and market research.
lines.zh: 你会协助社交媒体、营销活动和市场调研。

lines.en: That sounds perfect. How long is the internship?
lines.zh: 听起来很合适。实习期多长？

lines.en: It is a three-month program, starting in July.
Great, that fits my summer break. How do I apply?
lines.zh: 太好了，正好是我的暑假。怎么申请呢？

lines.en: Just send your resume and portfolio to this email.
lines.zh: 把简历和作品集发到这个邮箱就行。

lines.en: Thank you. I will send it today.
lines.zh: 谢谢。我今天就会发过去。
